PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for and with Richard Jerins. Omar Krashna for and with Gwendolyn Alkhqury.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation and to extend the Special Letters. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 5, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 7, 2011. The petitions were continued for a status conference to April 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Sepcial Letters are also extended to April 12, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
